emails.subject: RE: Coast Energy Canada, Inc.
emails.body: Do you have a contact at the Counterparty? It is not where they are headquartered that necessarily matters, but where they are incorporated. Walter Guidroz/ENRON@enronXgate 03/05/2001 10:10 AM
